languages.text: "Так я и не спорю. Но его законники порешали — не за их же победу стакан опорожнять?"
"I'm not claiming otherwise. But it was the lawmen who handled him — are you expecting me to drain a glass for their victory instead?"
languages.original_text: "Так я и не спорю. Но его законники порешали — не за их же победу стакан опорожнять?"

traits.locale_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"
"I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"

"I'm not claiming otherwise. But it was the lawmen who handled him — are you expecting me to drain a glass for their victory instead?"
"I'm not claiming otherwise. But it was the lawmen who handled him — are you expecting me to drain a glass for their victory instead?"

languages.text: 「それを否定するつもりはない。だが、法執行官たちが片を付けてくれた。彼らの勝利に一杯やらないか？」
languages.original_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"

traits.locale_text: 「それを否定するつもりはない。だが、法執行官たちが片を付けてくれた。彼らの勝利に一杯やらないか？」

「それを否定するつもりはない。だが、法執行官たちが片を付けてくれた。彼らの勝利に一杯やらないか？」

languages.text: "Ich behaupte nichts anderes. Aber die Gesetzeshüter haben ihn abserviert – warum also nicht ein Glas auf ihren Sieg leeren?"
languages.original_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich behaupte nichts anderes. Aber die Gesetzeshüter haben ihn abserviert – warum also nicht ein Glas auf ihren Sieg leeren?"

"Ich behaupte nichts anderes. Aber die Gesetzeshüter haben ihn abserviert – warum also nicht ein Glas auf ihren Sieg leeren?"

languages.text: "Buna itirazım yok. Yine de kanuncular gereğini yaptı. Zaferlerine ithafen bir kadeh dikmekten zarar gelmez."
languages.original_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"

traits.locale_text: "Buna itirazım yok. Yine de kanuncular gereğini yaptı. Zaferlerine ithafen bir kadeh dikmekten zarar gelmez."
"Buna itirazım yok. Yine de kanuncular gereğini yaptı. Zaferlerine ithafen bir kadeh dikmekten zarar gelmez."
"Buna itirazım yok. Yine de kanuncular gereğini yaptı. Zaferlerine ithafen bir kadeh dikmekten zarar gelmez."

languages.text: «No lo disputo, pero los agentes del orden se han ocupado de él. ¿Por qué no brindar por su victoria?».
languages.original_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"

traits.locale_text: «No lo disputo, pero los agentes del orden se han ocupado de él. ¿Por qué no brindar por su victoria?».
«No lo disputo, pero los agentes del orden se han ocupado de él. ¿Por qué no brindar por su victoria?».
«No lo disputo, pero los agentes del orden se han ocupado de él. ¿Por qué no brindar por su victoria?».

languages.text: “他确实是个王八蛋，但那些法务官已经把他处理掉了。来为法务官的胜利干杯吧？”
languages.original_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But the lawmen have handled him — why not drain a glass for their victory?"

traits.locale_text: “他确实是个王八蛋，但那些法务官已经把他处理掉了。来为法务官的胜利干杯吧？”
“他确实是个王八蛋，但那些法务官已经把他处理掉了。来为法务官的胜利干杯吧？”
“他确实是个王八蛋，但那些法务官已经把他处理掉了。来为法务官的胜利干杯吧？”

languages.text: « Je ne dis pas le contraire. Mais ce sont les représentants de l'ordre qui l'ont rattrapé. Vous vous attendez à ce que je trinque en leur honneur ? »
languages.original_text: "I'm not claiming otherwise. But it was the lawmen who handled him — are you expecting me to drain a glass for their victory instead?"
